scripts.build: pnpm --filter @earno/core build && pnpm --filter @earno/plugin-example build && pnpm --filter @earno/plugin-berachain build && pnpm --filter @earno/cli build && pnpm --filter earno-web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @earno/core build && pnpm --filter @earno/plugin-berachain test && pnpm --filter @earno/cli test
